headline: Hedge Funds Build Core Stakes In Freeport-McMoRan For Copper Gold Themes
summary: Millennium Management has significantly increased its position in Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE:FCX), making the miner a larger part of the hedge fund's core holdings. The move highlights growing institutional use of Freeport-McMoRan as a proxy for copper and gold exposure linked to EVs, AI and renewable energy themes. This change in ownership structure adds a fresh angle beyond recent focus on valuation and short term sentiment around NYSE:FCX. Freeport-McMoRan, trading at about $67.8 per share,...
